database_dialect.description: Specifies the SQL dialect for the Spanner database. Options include GOOGLE_STANDARD_SQL or POSTGRESQL.

ddl.description: Defines the Data Definition Language (DDL) statements for the database schema, specifying tables, indexes, and other schema-related elements. Must be valid Spanner DDL syntax.

deletion_protection.description: Indicates whether deletion protection is enabled for the database, preventing accidental deletion.

enable_drop_protection.description: Indicates whether the database is protected from being dropped; setting this to true prevents accidental deletion.

encryption_config.description: Specifies the encryption configuration for the Spanner database, including the key to use for customer-managed encryption. Must match the required format and permissions for Cloud KMS keys.

instance.description: Specifies the Spanner instance where the database will be created; must already exist in the same project and region.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the Spanner database, adhering to the naming requirements of Google Cloud Spanner.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for creating, updating, or deleting the Spanner database, ensuring operations complete within the specified time.

version_retention_period.description: Specifies the duration for retaining a version of a Cloud Spanner database schema, must be a valid duration string (e.g., "1h", "7d") and between 1 hour and 7 days.
